info.title: Sancta Clinic — Edge API
info.description: Offline-first clinic edge API (system of record). Every /api route is guarded by a deny-by-default permission (x-permission); the edge injects the authenticated user and roles at the session boundary. Contract enforced in CI by scripts/contract-check.ts.

Conflict.description: Business-rule or state conflict (e.g. period closed, segregation, duplicate).
